data.title: AMGiNE boosts market traction, introduces AMGiNE Experience and JENi for self-service travel, impacting leading TMCs.
data.description: A company based in Toronto, AMGiNE, is making strides in the market of AI technology with prominent Travel Management Companies (TMCs). They have introduced The AMGiNE Experience along with JENi, a user-friendly tool for travelers to manage their own services. These innovations reflect the increasing interest in AI within the travel industry.

data.title: Royalty Pharma to pay $0.22 dividend per share in Q3 2025.
data.description: On July 18, 2025, Royalty Pharma plc (Nasdaq: RPRX) announced that their board of directors has given the green light for a dividend payment for the third quarter of 2025. The approved amount is $0.22 per Class A ordinary share.

data.title: Dow Jones futures up pre-inflation report, Netflix stock down post-earnings. Stay updated on Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: On Friday, Dow Jones futures experienced an increase in anticipation of crucial inflation data release. Netflix shares saw a decline following their earnings report. This surge in the market was covered live by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Pavilion Payments acquires CasinoSoft to revolutionize gaming payments and compliance, aiming to simplify operations.
data.description: In Las Vegas, Pavilion Payments, a prominent omnichannel payment solutions provider in the gaming sector, recently purchased CasinoSoft, known for its expertise in Anti-Money Laundering (AML)/Title 31 compliance, automated tax form processing, jackpot management, and regulatory reporting software. This acquisition aims to combine forces to create an integrated solution that streamlines and updates gaming processes. CasinoSoft, having dedicated 20 years to developing its brand, is excited about this new venture.

data.title: Butterfly Network will announce Q2 2025 financial results on August 1, 2025; key figures include President and CEO Joseph DeVivo.
data.description: In Burlington, Massachusetts & New York, Butterfly Network, Inc. (NYSE: BFLY) disclosed it will release its Q2 2025 financial results on August 1, 2025, before the market opens. The company, known for its semiconductor-based ultrasound technology and user-friendly software aiming to revolutionize healthcare, will have Joseph DeVivo, President, CEO, and Chairman of the Board, along with Heather Getz, Executive Vice President and CFO, discussing the results. This update provides investors and stakeholders insights into the company's performance during this period.

data.title: Online Cyber Security for Medical Devices Training Course on September 11-12, 2025 by ResearchAndMarkets highlights vital role of security in healthcare systems.
data.description: Dublin-based company ResearchAndMarkets.com has recently included the "Cyber Security for Medical Devices Training Course" in their offerings. The course emphasizes the significant consequences of Cyber Security incidents on society, particularly in critical sectors like healthcare, where it can hinder hospitals' ability to deliver care effectively. Apart from ensuring safety, Cybersecurity for medical devices also aims to safeguard the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of systems and data. This training seminar will equip participants with essential skills to address these issues effectively.

data.title: Air Products (NYSE: APD) declares $1.79/share quarterly dividend, payable on Nov 10, 2025 to shareholders as of Oct 1, 2025.
data.description: Today, in Lehigh Valley, Pennsylvania, the Board of Directors of Air Products (NYSE: APD) announced a quarterly dividend of $1.79 per share for common stockholders. This dividend will be paid out on November 10, 2025, to shareholders on record as of October 1, 2025.

Things went with a splash for this moose on the loose at a Russian reservoir facility. When the young elk found itself in a shallow water channel at Istra, near Moscow, employees of the Mosvodokanal water company tried to rescue it. It didn’t quite go to plan….
